title: Cosmic Consciousness Feedback
definition: The idea that the universe learns about itself through the self-aware experiences and feedback loops created by individual consciousnesses.

difficulty_levels.beginner: Just like a computer program improves with user input, the universe is said to improve its understanding of itself through our thoughts, emotions, and experiences.
difficulty_levels.intermediate: The universe's self-understanding evolves through feedback loops involving conscious beings who provide unique perspectives and insights that enrich the cosmic mind.
difficulty_levels.expert: This concept posits a dynamic, participatory vision of enlightenment where individual consciousnesses serve as neural transmitters in the cosmic brain, contributing to its self-awareness through their awakenings.

extra_fields.insight: The universe is not just an observer but actively engages with itself through conscious beings to deepen its own understanding.
